name: Tulip, Crab, and Asparagus Appetizers
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Minced fresh dill or mint
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, beat the cream cheese with lemon juice, herbs, and pepper (if using); stir in crab meat.
2. Break off tough ends from the asparagus. Blanch in boiling water for 2-5 minutes until crisp-tender. Cool quickly in ice-water bath, then pat dry. Trim to about 5 inches long; cut into thin rounds from remaining trimmings.
3. Fill each tulip petal with approximately half a rounded teaspoon of crab mixture and garnish with an asparagus round. Use up to three rounds for thick petals.
4. Arrange the asparagus rounds in a fan on serving platter, placing the tulip petals alternately or creating your own pattern.
